title: Party Paper Solutions paper drinking straws, red and white striped, biodegradable, environmentally friendly, approx. 20 cm, 50 pieces.
features: Paper straws, red and white striped, 50 pieces.
description: 50 paper drinking straws with red and white stripes. Our straws are compostable and much better for the environment. Made from strong paper, they don't get soaked in drinks. Ideal for parties or catering events.
